verdict_reasoning: IZUMO4 is a soluble protein lacking a transmembrane domain, expressed in testis with cytoplasmic/intra-acrosomal localization. Unlike its family members IZUMO1-3 which are TM proteins on sperm surfaces, IZUMO4 has no membrane anchor of its own. Although it may be part of sperm protein complexes, it has no documented stable covalent or wash-resistant attachment to a surface TM partner. It is not accessible from outside the cell.
